experiment_design.hypothesis: RUN03B standalone ExtraTrees can be checked in MT5 without Stage 10/11 thresholds, sessions, contexts, or comparison baselines.
experiment_design.decision_use: Observe standalone trading-risk execution behavior, not promotion.
experiment_design.invalid_conditions: ONNX parity failure, MT5 compile failure, terminal run failure, or runtime telemetry missing

source_threshold.decision_policy: predict short or long only when predicted non-flat class confidence is at or above the validation q90 threshold

boundary: standalone MT5 runtime_probe only; not alpha quality, live readiness, runtime authority expansion, or operating promotion
